ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT REYES, SERGIO BOFFIL, EUSTAQUIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYES, SERGIO BOFFIL, EUSTAQUIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3435 18TH STREET #6, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-05-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E ON WRIT THRU & INCLUDING 8-5-96. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES FROM 7-1-96 THRU 7-22-96 IN THE AMOUNT OF $1201.76. PLTF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1012.50. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WILL SIGN STIP TO VACATE JDGMNT.DEFTS DELIVER KEYS TO MGR.
